arts.ttl: EFL confirm official decision ahead of Leeds United v Oxford United
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Oxford United at Elland Road this afternoon, and referee James Bell has been confirmed to take charge. The EFL have confirmed the referee appointments for Championship fixtures all the way up to January 2, with Leeds’ fixture against Oxford being officiated by James Bell.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Oxford United with Pascal Struijk and Max Wober decisions made
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Leeds v Oxford preview: Analysis and more
arts.sum: Leeds United need to get back to winning ways after a dismal draw at Preston last weekend, but face the ideal opposition in Oxford United at Elland Road. Leeds facing Oxford United side smarting at loss of Des Buckingham

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Oxford United on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Leeds United will be bidding to extend their unbeaten Championship run to four matches when they entertain lowly Oxford United. If you join our WhatsApp community, we will send links to the blog and post-match analysis straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: If Leeds United man doesn’t play tomorrow v Oxford, he needs to ask Farke to leave
arts.sum: Leeds United have a mini centre-back crisis for this weekend against Oxford United, with Pascal Struijk and Max Wöber doubts, while Ethan Ampadu remains likely unable to complete 90 minutes, which opens the door for James Debayo . Leeds team news pre-Oxford: Struijk and Wöber doubts, Ampadu update

arts.ttl: Leeds United tried for PL man in August, now available in Jan and Farke loves him
arts.sum: Leeds United made an attempt to sign Andrew Omobamidele back in August from Nottingham Forest, and he’s set to be available for loan in January. “Leeds United showed interest in signing the centre-back in August, with manager Daniel Farke giving him his debut at former club Norwich City.”

arts.ttl: Ex-Leeds United favourite Mateusz Klich joins new MLS team amid transfer U-turn
arts.sum: The statement went on to say D.C. United could also receive up to $50,000 in conditional 2026 General Allocation Money (GAM) if Atlanta re-signs Klich. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: EFL considering huge VAR overhaul amid Leeds United’s latest referee frustrations
arts.sum: Leeds United and the rest of the Championship could be impacted significantly by the introduction of VAR in the near future by the EFL. The Times have reported that the EFL are now considering implementing VAR into the Championship in the near future.

arts.ttl: Oxford United appoint former Birmingham City boss as new head coach ahead of Leeds United trip
arts.sum: Oxford United have today confirmed Gary Rowett as their new head coach ahead of tomorrow's clash with Leeds United. Every decision taken is with the best interests of Oxford United in mind and we are confident that Gary will be instrumental in fulfilling our ambitions this season and beyond.

arts.ttl: Sunderland are 'not in the same place' as Leeds United and Sheffield United in the title fight
arts.sum: Sunderland head coach Regis Le Bris has shrugged off talk of keeping pace with the likes of Sheffield United, Leeds United and Burnley in the race for promotion. The Black Cats sit in fourth position in the Championship, just two points off Leeds, who currently occupy the second automatic promotion spot.
